retrieved_result: Backstabbing Coworker Backstabbing Coworker I work with someone who is a backstabber to all that know them. When I became new in this position one of my friends warned me about them and gave me advise on who to trust. Boy, was I grateful for her advise. She was right on the money. Since I have learned what this person is
